info.name: CV Cats REST API
info.description:
A comprehensive API for CV parsing, management, and processing using AI technology.

All endpoints (except authentication) require a valid JWT token obtained through Firebase authentication.

## Setup
1. Set the `BASE_URL` variable to your API server URL
2. Set the `FIREBASE_TOKEN` variable to your Firebase ID token
3. Run the **Login** request — the JWT token will be auto-saved to `JWT_TOKEN`
4. All other requests will use `JWT_TOKEN` automatically

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Endpoints for authenticating with the API using Firebase tokens.

request.description:
Authenticate with a Firebase ID token and receive a JWT for API access.

Alternatively, you can send the Firebase token in the Authorization header:
`Authorization: Bearer <firebase-id-token>`

**Post-script:** On success, the returned JWT is automatically saved to the `JWT_TOKEN` collection variable.

response.name: Success
Error - No Token
Error - Invalid Token

item.name: CV Management
item.description: Endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting CVs.

formdata.description: CV file to parse (PDF, DOC, DOCX, or TXT — max 10MB)

request.description:
Upload and parse a CV file using AI to extract structured data.

⚠️ This endpoint can take 15-30 seconds to process.

**Supported formats:** PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT
**Max file size:** 10MB

Returns parsed data only — does NOT save to collection. Use `/cv/import` to parse and save.

response.name: Success
Error - No File

formdata.description: CV file to import (PDF, DOC, DOCX, or TXT — max 10MB)

request.description:
Upload and parse a CV file using AI, then automatically save it to your CV collection.

⚠️ This endpoint can take 15-30 seconds to process.

**Supported formats:** PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT
**Max file size:** 10MB

**Auto-verification:** When a valid email is found in the parsed CV, a verification email is sent in the background.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "error": false,
  "message": "CV imported successfully",
  "data": {
    "_id": "60f1b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b4",
    "title": "John Doe's CV",
    "description": "Imported CV data",
    "cvSource": "parsed",
    "isParsedByAi": true,
    "isDraft": true,
    "cvType": "base",
    "data": {
      "basics": {
        "name": "John Doe",
        "label": "Software Engineer",
        "email": "john.doe@example.com"
      }
    },
    "versionNumber": "1.0",
    "_parent": null,
    "_user": "60f1b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b1",
    "createdAt": "2023-05-27T10:30:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2023-05-27T10:30:00.000Z",
    "_versions": [],
    "_exportHistory": []
  }
}

response.name: Error - Duplicate Email
Error - Creation Limit

request.description:
Create a new CV with structured JSON Resume data.

**Auto-verification:** When a valid `data.basics.email` is present, a verification email is automatically sent in the background.

response.name: Success
Error - Empty Data
Error - Missing Name
Error - Duplicate Email
Error - Creation Limit

query.description: Sort field: createdAt, updatedAt, title, versionNumber, cvType, isDraft (default: createdAt)
Sort order: asc or desc (default: desc)
Filter by CV type: base or tailored

request.description:
Retrieve all CVs for the authenticated user with pagination, sorting, and filtering.

Optional filters (`isDraft`, `cvType`, `parentId`) are disabled by default — enable them as needed.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "error": false,
  "message": "CVs fetched successfully",
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "60f1b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b2",
      "title": "John Doe's CV",
      "description": "Main CV for software engineer positions",
      "isParsedByAi": true,
      "isEmailVerified": true,
      "isDraft": false,
      "cvType": "base",
      "versionNumber": "1.0",
      "_parent": null,
      "generatedSummary": "Experienced software engineer with expertise in...",
      "_user": "60f1b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b2b1",
      "createdAt": "2023-05-27T10:30:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2023-05-27T10:30:00.000Z",
      "data": {
        "basics": {
          "name": "John Doe",
          "label": "Software Engineer",
          "email": "john.doe@example.com",
          "phone": "+1-555-123-4567",
          "summary": "Experienced software engineer..."
        }
      },
      "_versions": [],
      "_exportHistory": []
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "currentPage": 1,
    "totalPages": 3,
    "totalCount": 25,
    "limit": 10,
    "hasNextPage": true,
    "hasPrevPage": false
  }
}

request.description: Get detailed information for a specific CV by its ID.

response.name: Success
Error - Not Found

request.description:
Update an existing CV by ID. Supports partial updates — only include fields you want to change.

**Email updates:** If `data.basics.email` is changed, `isEmailVerified` resets to `false` and a verification email is sent to the new address.

response.name: Success
Error - Not Found
Error - Email Removal
Error - Invalid Email
Error - Duplicate Email

request.description: Delete a CV by its ID.

response.name: Success
Error - Not Found

variable.description: The CV ID to verify email for

request.description:
Manually trigger email verification for a CV. Sends a verification link to the email address in `data.basics.email`.

If a verification email was previously sent, this invalidates all prior tokens and sends a fresh link.

response.name: Success - Email Sent
Success - Already Verified
Error - No Email
Error - Not Found
